name: hyrox-claude-skills
description: Standalone open-source Claude Agent Skills repository for HYROX performance coaching — source of truth for the HYROX content ingested by the Skill Me catalog and served over MCP. Independent and not affiliated with HYROX World GmbH.

scripts.validate: npm run validate:frontmatter && npm run validate:skills && npm run validate:links && npm run validate:triggers && npm run validate:sources
scripts.build: npm run build:inventory && npm run build:seed
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run validate && npm run test && npm run build && npm run evals
